name: Atlas Ground-Truth Box
status: active (read-only contract; sweep steward Phase B)
does_not_own: the contents of /Users/jakeaaron/Documents/Atlas itself — Pieces writes those, never project agents
the Pieces MCP server — that's a separate connector at localhost:39300
the Live Pieces ribbon on the grid home page — that consumes Pieces sweeps separately

source_of_truth.what_atlas_is_truth_for: operator-actual-machine-activity over time. When project-agent ledger writes contradict Atlas observations, Atlas wins for what-actually-happened-on-the-operator's-machine. Project agents win for what-the-system-now-claims (the ledger is authority for project state).
source_of_truth.what_atlas_is_NOT_truth_for: decisions, source-of-truth rules, project-architecture commitments — those live in the project's own ledger system (Decisions, Source-of-Truth, Box, etc.)

structure.daily_folders: Atlas creates a new folder every morning, named e.g. 'Thursday, April 30th, 2026'. Each folder accumulates pieces_*.md summary files throughout the day as Pieces curates workstreams.
structure.summary_file_format: Each pieces_*.md file is a markdown summary with sections: TLDR, Core Tasks & Projects, Key Discussions & Decisions, Resources Reviewed, Next Steps. Filename includes a slug hint of the workstream's topic (e.g. pieces_cc_agent_phase_b_launch.md, pieces_agent_ledger_philosophy.md).
structure.non_project_content: Atlas captures EVERYTHING on the operator's machine, including non-project activity (entertainment, philosophical exploration, third-party tooling research). The sweep steward MUST filter for project-relevance — not every Pieces summary belongs in the ledger system.
structure.top_level_files: build.py, neighborhood_layout.py, atlas.html, map.html, etc. — these are Atlas's own internal tooling, not summary content. Sweep steward ignores them.

subscribes.filter: all daily folders, all pieces_*.md files
subscribes.interpreter: external — project agents do not subscribe in the Box Bus sense; the steward POLLS Atlas
subscribes.phase_c_note: Phase C runtime might surface Atlas as a true subscription source

emits.phase_c_note: manual append today; bus-emit when Phase C lands
When Atlas observation contradicts a project ledger claim, file PROB. Manual today.
When Atlas surfaces a project-relevant pattern (operator focus shift, recurring pain point, decision-context that didn't make it to a DEC entry), file COMM. Manual today.
Pieces 'Next Steps' sections are atom-suggestion fuel. The steward proposes new atoms to DRAFTS/ATOMIZATION/ for human review. Manual today.

guardrails: READ-ONLY against Atlas — never write into /Users/jakeaaron/Documents/Atlas/
Filter for project-relevance — Atlas captures everything; not every summary is project memory
Never invent observations — if Pieces didn't surface it, the steward can't claim it as ground truth
Reconcile gently — when ledger and Atlas disagree, file a PROB, do not auto-overwrite the ledger
audit_only is the safe default; reconcile mode requires explicit dispatch
agent_config.dispatch_status: not yet wired — see PROB filed by this Box's creation
agent_config.resolution_helper: server.py _agent_resolve_prompt — falls through legacy (none) directly to unified Box. Same pattern as file_directory_steward.
agent_config.sweep_cadence_planned: daily at end-of-day, claiming the day's folder; or on-demand via dispatch

phase_status.phase_a: complete (Atlas itself has been accumulating since at least 2026-04-24; this Box formalizes it as a project surface 2026-04-30)
phase_status.phase_b: complete (2026-05-01) — runnable form authored (ATOM-0107), inaugural sweep + digest produced (ATOM-0108), resolution smoke test passed (ATOM-0109), INDEX.md flipped active + PROB-015 closed (ATOM-0110). Daily 8 AM ET cron at CCAgentindex/triggers/atlas_daily_sweep.json fires automatically.
phase_status.phase_c: deferred (subscribes/emits documented but not consumed by router; runtime per DEC-2026-04-29-013)

related_ledgers: SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md (Atlas trust ordering — operator-actual-activity wins over agent claims for what-happened)
OPEN_PROBLEMS_LEDGER.md (PROB filed by this Box's creation — Atlas Sweep Steward not yet runnable)
COMMUNICATIONS_LEDGER.md (COMM filed for the architecture decision — Atlas as ground-truth surface)
CONNECTIONS.md (Pieces MCP at localhost:39300 — Atlas is the disk artifact of Pieces output)
Sibling Boxes (read-side patterns to mirror): LEDGERS/BOXES/global_ledger/, temporal_continuity/, file_directory/

history.event: Atlas integrated as project surface. Symlink created at LEDGERS/atlas → /Users/jakeaaron/Documents/Atlas (gitignored). Atlas Box authored as ground_truth_source class (new kind). Steward files staged at steward/ — runnable form pending Phase B graduation. COMM-2026-04-30-007 filed for the architecture decision. PROB-2026-04-30-015 filed for the steward graduation work.
